metadata.description: Unified benchmark export with full run specs, Monte Carlo summaries, and advanced analysis.
metadata.python_version: 3.13.9 | packaged by Anaconda, Inc. | (main, Oct 21 2025, 19:09:58) [MSC v.1929 64 bit (AMD64)]

run_configuration.benchmark_scope: Dense 30-point family sweeps built on the modular Monte Carlo benchmark.
run_configuration.authority_statement: This run reuses the active modular estimator registry but replaces the canonical scenario catalog with dense parametric sweeps to study estimator degradation against one dominant variable per family.

estimator_registry.benchmark_scope: Full modular Monte Carlo benchmark under src/pipelines
estimator_registry.authority_statement: The active benchmark is defined by the modular pipeline under src/pipelines. Legacy wrappers and historical paper subsets are secondary views and must adapt to the active pipeline artifacts.

monte_carlo.description: Monte Carlo robustness analysis exported from per-run summary CSVs. Each estimator/scenario pair includes descriptive statistics for all tracked metrics.

pareto_front.objective: minimize RMSE and CPU time simultaneously

family_hypothesis_tests.note: Exploratory family-level tests across Monte Carlo run rows. Use as secondary evidence, not as the sole paper claim source.
